default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Rachel to the Cresta content production workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Workflow:** Generate drafts in Atlas, refine in Claude using the "Adira checklist" for quality control, then publish in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Post-Processing Time Varies by Article Type:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Regular:** \~35 mins](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Competitive/Nuanced:** 45–60 mins (requires deep research to align with Cresta's unique positioning)](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Critical Webflow Publishing Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Format tables as HTML embeds (use Claude for Markdown-to-HTML conversion).](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Set image size to the full-width option to prevent layout errors.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Review Process:** Drafts move from editorial review (Nikki K-O-I) to product review (Nikki K-K-I/Oran). Minor edits can be published directly; major rewrites require re-submission.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Workflow

  - [**1. Draft Generation (Atlas)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [Use the "ASCII generation with stats" pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Prompt Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
          - [`Overview`: Topic](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
          - [`Word Count`: 1,800–2,500 words (aim for longer drafts to simplify editing).](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
          - [`Goal`: Topic](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
          - [`Topics to Cover`:](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
              - [Generate an initial outline in Perplexity by analyzing top-ranking articles.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
              - [Edit the outline for relevance before pasting.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
              - [Always include "Prefstar CTA" to prompt a call-to-action.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [**2. Refinement & Editing (Claude)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [Paste Atlas output into the "Cresta's Outliner and Output Editor" (Pod 0).](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Primary Instruction:** "Run through the Adira checklist."](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
          - [This checklist (in the Claude prompt) catches 85–90% of issues.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
          - [**Future Improvement:** File a ticket to embed the checklist directly into Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Common Manual Edits:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [Remove AI-isms (e.g., "in this article," "changes the equation").](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [**Contextualize statistics:** Add commentary to explain the "so-what" effect of data.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**3. Publishing (Webflow)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Navigation:** `Cresta CMS` → `Guides`](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
          - [`Name`: H1 title](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
          - [`Slug`: Keyword](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
          - [`Category`: Select from dropdown](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
          - [`Cover Image`: Use stock images (e.g., Unsplash) as placeholders.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Tables:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
          - [Webflow requires HTML embeds.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
          - [**Process:** Paste Markdown table into Claude → Ask for HTML conversion → Paste HTML into a Webflow `HTML Embed` element.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
          - [**Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
              - ["IQ Series" research charts (link in Notion/Woodrocks).](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
              - [Diagrams from Cresta product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
          - [**Critical Step:** In Webflow, select the full-width image size option to prevent layout errors.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

### Review & Feedback Process

  - [**Airtable Statuses:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [`Drafts for Review`: Editorial review by Nikki K-O-I.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [`Product Team Review`: Product review by Nikki K-K-I or Oran.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [`Ready to Publish`: Final status before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Feedback Handling:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Minor Edits:** Fix, then publish directly.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Major Rewrites:** Re-submit for review and notify the team via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
          - [**Example:** An article that incorrectly listed competitors required a full rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

### Article Types & Post-Processing Time

  - [**1. Regular Articles (\~35 mins)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [Standard concept guides or listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Process:** Generate in Atlas → Refine in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**2. Competitive Articles (45–60 mins)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Atlas often mispositions competitors, requiring heavy manual correction.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
          - [**Input:** Manually provide a researched list of competitors in the Atlas prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
          - [**Pipeline:** Use the "agency competitor pipeline," which has Cresta's specific guidelines embedded.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
          - [**Future Improvement:** Create a dedicated artifact for competitor positioning to automate this.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**3. Nuanced Articles (45–60 mins)**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Requires deep research to align with Cresta's unique philosophy (e.g., human-agent augmentation before automation).](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Process:** Supplement Atlas output with insights from Cresta leadership (e.g., CEO podcasts) to inject a "leadershipy" tone.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Assignment Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Balance priorities and commercial interests.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [**Method:** Select a mix of topics from Airtable each week:](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [1–2 High Priority](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [1–2 Medium Priority](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [1 Low Priority](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Always include at least one topic with commercial intent.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ademilade:** Send the editorial checklist and operating manual to Rachel today.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Review all materials and begin testing the production pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up meeting next week for a progress review.](https://fathom.video/share/oryR2o1LbRs4RxdNKC3sJMzsEtPmXXbU?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

action_items.description: Add Workflow CMS link to Cresta operating manual
Download Claude Cresta Outliner/Output Editor to your pod
Send Rachel editorial checklist + operating manual (link this recording)
